title: I can't update the EAN of my SKUs via API

title: I am getting 500 errors in VTEX IO CLI
domain_logic: The failure is triggered through VTEX IO CLI usage and belongs to VTEX IO platform behavior.
symptom_logic: The user sees an explicit execution error and likely needs to verify local or platform setup.

title: I am getting errors with my service configuration app
domain_logic: The article is about VTEX IO app behavior and a configuration app lifecycle within the app ecosystem.

domain_logic: Workspace creation belongs to VTEX IO, and Search is the dependent product area involved in the failure.

domain_logic: The article is about VTEX IO app versioning rules and app installation behavior.
symptom_logic: The user cannot complete installation because version constraints are rejected by validation rules.

domain_logic: The user is installing VTEX IO tooling and interacting directly with VTEX IO platform setup.

domain_logic: Publishing happens in VTEX IO, depends on app lifecycle, and blocks a Store Framework theme.
symptom_logic: Publishing is blocked because dependency validation rejects deprecated or unstable versions.

domain_logic: Theme behavior is managed through VTEX IO and becomes visible in a Store Framework storefront.

title: Issues during extending the FastStore API schema
domain_logic: FastStore is the implementation context and the article is about storefront schema extension behavior.
